scenario: Case 1: No Index, Raw SQL (Hard DX)
query_text:
SELECT 
        r.year, 
        d.driverref, 
        con.name AS constructor_name
    FROM results res
    JOIN races r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
    JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitid = c.circuitid
    JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
    JOIN constructors con ON res.constructorid = con.constructorid
    WHERE c.name = 'Circuit de Monaco' 
      AND res.positionorder = 1
    ORDER BY r.year DESC;

scenario: Case 2: No Index, Standard View (Easy DX)
query_text:
SELECT 
        year, 
        driverref, 
        constructor_name
    FROM v_race_complete_details
    WHERE circuit_name = 'Circuit de Monaco' 
      AND positionorder = 1
    ORDER BY year DESC;

        year,

    FROM mv_race_complete_details
